title: Software Engineer
description: Design, develop, and maintain software applications and systems. Software engineers work across industries — from startups to FAANG companies — building products used by millions. In India, this is one of the most sought-after careers with strong growth prospects.

entry_paths.path: B.Tech/B.E. in Computer Science or IT (4 years)

day_in_life.morning: Stand-up meeting with the team, review pull requests
day_in_life.midday: Deep coding session — building new features or fixing bugs
day_in_life.evening: Testing, deployment, or learning new technologies

title: Chartered Accountant (CA)
description: CAs are the backbone of India's financial ecosystem — handling auditing, taxation, financial advisory, and corporate governance. One of the most respected professions in India with a clear, structured path through ICAI examinations.

entry_paths.path: CA Foundation (after 12th) → CA Intermediate → CA Final + 3 years articleship
B.Com + CA route (can start Intermediate after graduation)

college_options: ICAI (Institute of Chartered Accountants of India) — self-study or coaching

day_in_life.morning: Review financial statements and audit working papers
day_in_life.afternoon: Statutory compliance, GST filings, advisory work
day_in_life.evening: Preparing audit reports, continuing professional education

title: Doctor (MBBS)
description: Doctors diagnose and treat patients, saving lives and improving health outcomes. In India, medicine remains one of the most aspirational careers. The journey is long but deeply rewarding — from MBBS to specialization through MD/MS.

day_in_life.morning: Ward rounds, patient examinations, morning OPD
day_in_life.midday: Surgeries or procedures (for surgical specialties), case discussions

title: Architect
description: Architects design buildings and spaces that shape how people live, work, and interact. Combining artistic vision with engineering precision, this career blends creativity with technical expertise. India's rapid urbanization makes this field increasingly important.

day_in_life.afternoon: Client presentations, coordination with engineers and contractors
day_in_life.evening: Research on materials, sustainability reviews, design competitions

title: Data Scientist
description: Data scientists extract insights from large datasets using statistics, machine learning, and programming. They help businesses make data-driven decisions. One of the fastest-growing careers globally, with strong demand in Indian tech hubs.

entry_paths.path: B.Tech in CS/IT + self-study in ML/Stats
Any engineering degree + PG Diploma in Data Science

day_in_life.morning: Exploratory data analysis, checking model performance metrics
day_in_life.midday: Feature engineering, model training and experimentation
day_in_life.afternoon: Stakeholder presentations, translating insights into recommendations
day_in_life.evening: Reading research papers, Kaggle competitions, upskilling

title: Content Creator / Digital Media
description: Content creators produce engaging digital content — videos, blogs, podcasts, social media — building audiences and brands. In India, the creator economy is booming with platforms like YouTube, Instagram, and podcasts offering real career paths.

day_in_life.afternoon: Publishing, community engagement, responding to comments
day_in_life.evening: Analytics review, collaboration outreach, brand deal negotiations

title: Lawyer
description: Lawyers advise clients on legal matters, represent them in court, and draft legal documents. India's legal profession spans corporate law, litigation, IP law, and public interest. Top lawyers are among the highest earners in the country.

day_in_life.morning: Reviewing case files, legal research, preparing arguments
day_in_life.afternoon: Drafting contracts/petitions, team discussions on case strategy
day_in_life.evening: Reading judgments, preparing for next day's hearings

title: Civil Services (IAS/IPS/IFS)
description: Civil servants administer India's governance at district, state, and national levels. The IAS, IPS, and IFS are among the most prestigious careers in India, offering the power to create large-scale societal impact.

entry_paths.path: Any graduation + UPSC CSE preparation (1-3 attempts typical)

required_exams: UPSC Civil Services Exam (Prelims + Mains + Interview)

day_in_life.morning: District/office meetings, reviewing files and policy briefs
day_in_life.midday: Field visits, inspections, public grievance hearings
day_in_life.evening: Community engagement, review of development projects

title: Product Manager
description: Product managers define what gets built and why. They sit at the intersection of technology, business, and design, owning the product roadmap. In India's booming startup ecosystem, PMs are in high demand at companies like Flipkart, Razorpay, and Zerodha.

entry_paths.path: B.Tech + 2-3 years in engineering/consulting → PM transition
Any degree + APM programs at startups

day_in_life.morning: Reviewing product metrics, sprint planning with engineers
day_in_life.midday: User research calls, analyzing feedback and usage data
day_in_life.afternoon: Writing PRDs, design reviews, stakeholder alignment
day_in_life.evening: Competitive analysis, roadmap planning, industry reading

title: Investment Banker
description: Investment bankers advise companies on mergers, acquisitions, IPOs, and capital raising. It is one of the highest-paying careers with intense work demands. India's growing capital markets make this field increasingly relevant.

day_in_life.midday: Financial modeling, valuation analysis, pitch book preparation

title: UX/UI Designer
description: UX/UI designers create intuitive, beautiful digital experiences. They research user needs, design interfaces, and prototype solutions. With India's tech boom, design has become a high-demand, well-paying creative career.

day_in_life.morning: User research review, design system updates
day_in_life.midday: Wireframing and prototyping in Figma, design critiques
day_in_life.afternoon: Usability testing sessions, developer handoff meetings
day_in_life.evening: Exploring design inspiration, Dribbble/Behance, personal projects

title: Mechanical Engineer
description: Mechanical engineers design, analyze, and manufacture mechanical systems — from automobiles to HVAC to robotics. India's manufacturing push (Make in India) and EV revolution make this a field with strong long-term prospects.

entry_paths.path: B.Tech + M.Tech (specialization in robotics, thermal, etc.)

day_in_life.afternoon: Cross-functional meetings with production and quality teams

title: Clinical Psychologist
description: Clinical psychologists assess and treat mental health conditions using therapeutic techniques. With India's growing awareness of mental health, this career is gaining recognition and demand. They work in hospitals, clinics, schools, and private practice.

entry_paths.path: B.A./B.Sc Psychology + M.A./M.Sc Clinical Psychology + RCI registration
B.A. Psychology + M.Phil Clinical Psychology (RCI recognized)

title: Entrepreneur / Startup Founder
description: Entrepreneurs identify opportunities and build businesses from the ground up. India's startup ecosystem is the third-largest globally, with unicorns across fintech, edtech, healthtech, and D2C. No fixed path — passion, resilience, and execution matter most.

entry_paths.path: Start while in college — build, fail, learn
Work 3-5 years in industry → identify gap → start up

required_exams: None required — but CAT/GMAT help for MBA route

day_in_life.morning: Reviewing metrics, team stand-up, investor updates
day_in_life.midday: Product development, customer calls, sales pitches
day_in_life.evening: Strategic planning, networking events, reading and learning

title: Environmental Scientist
description: Environmental scientists study ecosystems, pollution, and climate change to develop solutions for sustainability. With India facing acute environmental challenges — air pollution, water scarcity, waste management — this career has growing national importance.

day_in_life.morning: Field sampling — water, air, or soil quality testing
day_in_life.afternoon: Report writing, environmental impact assessment reviews
day_in_life.evening: Policy research, grant writing, community awareness programs
